name: Solr cloud
description: Solr Cloud — Distributed mode of Apache Solr for scalable enterprise search with sharding and replication.

seo.title: Solr cloud — Search / Recommendations API
seo.meta_description: Solr cloud: Solr Cloud — Distributed mode of Apache Solr for scalable enterprise search with sharding and replication.

when_to_use: Distributed search with sharding for high-volume corpus
Enterprise search replication across data centers
Faceted search and relevance tuning for large catalogs
Log analytics platform built on Solr Cloud
Self-hosted alternative to Elasticsearch for regulated data

pros: Open-source and Apache-licensed; no vendor lock-in
Proven at massive scale with sharding and replication
Rich query syntax and faceting capabilities
Huge ecosystem of plugins and integrations
cons: Operationally heavy; running SolrCloud needs real expertise
Default relevance tuning trails modern AI-native search
Community momentum has shifted toward Elasticsearch and OpenSearch
Admin UIs feel dated compared to newer platforms
review.verdict: Still powerful for teams with Solr expertise and specific ranking needs, but Elasticsearch/OpenSearch are more common defaults.
review.best_for: Large enterprises with deep Solr expertise or specialized relevance requirements.
review.not_for: New projects without search ops experience or teams wanting managed simplicity.
